programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence and Chris Pratt star in an adventure about two passengers traveling to a new planet when their spaceship malfunctions.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Ultraviolet (2006)
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Angel Eyes
programme.desc: After meeting under extraordinary life-and-death circumstances, a Chicago police officer (Lopez) and a lost soul named Catch (Caviezel) fall in love. While uncovering the truth about Catch, she is forced to deal with the secrets of her own past.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: In the wake of Jesse's brush with death, Walt agrees to produce even more drugs for the ruthless Tuco, while Skyler suspects that her sister shoplifted an expensive baby shower present.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As they lay plans for their final big drug deals, Walt and Jesse worry that their sole buyer, Tuco, will think nothing of killing them as soon as it suits him.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Hank comes dangerously close to uncovering his role in the drug trade, Walt devises a plan to cover his tracks.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: With Walt struggling to bridge the growing gulf between him and Skyler, Jesse finds himself without a home after his parents evict him from the house where he's been living.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Walt's medical bills and domestic problems mount, Jesse will only agree to get back into the drug business if he can dictate the terms.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.sub-title: And The Bag's In The River

They have more than they ever wished for, but when the combination of marriage and motherhood approach, the gals take an exotic vacation in Abu Dhabi. The sun-drenched paradise holds many surprises -- especially for Carrie, who faces temptation when she unexpectedly runs into Aidan.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Table 19
programme.desc: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: The Spectacular Now
programme.desc: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2014; Niall builds a new life, but old ties resurface when Mona reconnects with Ruben, forcing difficult choices.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
programme.desc: Debuting original material about the shared experiences as humans, tackling topics like family, religion and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity; expecting an original and unforgettable experience, filmed at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: APD cold case detective Dan Jackson reveals the behind-the-scenes details of the painstaking work that he and other investigators used in tracking down the killer of four teenage girls in Austin, Texas in 1991.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: Fackham Hall
programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: John Wick
programme.desc: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 4
programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: From the World of John Wick: Ballerina
programme.desc: Trained in the assassin traditions of the Ruska Roma, Eve Macarro takes on an army of killers as she seeks revenge against those responsible for the death of her father.

programme.title: My Blind Brother
programme.desc: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 2014; Niall builds a new life, but old ties resurface when Mona reconnects with Ruben, forcing difficult choices.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: US Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team
programme.desc: Less than two years from the 2026 World Cup, Mauricio Pochettino takes over as USMNT head coach, introducing a fresh vision and new philosophy.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: Warfare
programme.desc: The harrowing true story of a U.S. Navy SEAL platoon surveillance mission gone dangerously wrong.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George goes on an unsuccessful date; Jeff struggles to thwart Louie's bid for the crown; Darla Smith, a former elephant trainer, enters the fray with an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: Jeff gains the upper hand over Louie; Darla's promotion to co-general manager leads to disastrous consequences for both Jeff and herself; George finally lands on the only successor he can trust.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George Coulam, the aging founder of the Texas Renaissance Festival, has ruled over his subjects for decades; general manager Jeff Baldwin believes he is next in line to succeed, until kingpin Louie Migliaccio hatches a plan to buy the festival.

programme.title: Architecton
programme.desc: A hypnotic, propulsive odyssey through the foundations of the modern world, following mountains as they are turned into concrete and buildings as they are turned into rubble.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: The Switch
programme.desc: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

programme.title: Table 19
programme.desc: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: The Florida Project
programme.desc: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Chronicles the lucrative world of YouTube vlogging, including social media archival footage of Myka and James Stauffer; Hannah Cho, an avid YouTube consumer, explains how daily videos and constant updates provide a sense of community.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: The business of family vlogging is explored; as adoption day approaches, the Stauffers post videos counting down the days.

programme.title: An Update on Our Family
programme.desc: Concerned fans turn to critics; commentators shed light on the Stauffers' catalogue of content, dissecting their lavish lifestyle and their adopted son's treatment; an update from the family results in brands dropping their sponsorship.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat Annihilation
programme.desc: Every generation, a portal opens up between the Outerworld and Earth. Emperor Shao Kahn (Brian Thompson), ruler of the mythical Outerworld, pounces the moment the portal reopens and slips through with his mighty warriors, intent on total domination and uniting the two worlds. However, he has only seven days to complete his task. In the meantime, opposition grows and warriors Sonya Blade (Sandra Hess), Jax (Lynn "Red" Williams), Kitana (Talisa Soto) and Liu Kang (Robin Shou) get ready for war.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Superman: The Movie
programme.desc: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Superman II
programme.desc: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

programme.title: Count Abdulla
programme.desc: Comedy series about twenty-something British-Pakistani Muslim doctor Abdulla Khan. After gatecrashing Amrita's sister Preethi's hen night, Abdulla is introduced as Amrita's new Sikh boyfriend and Preethi is beyond excited to welcome him to the family - so much so, in fact, that she insists that he comes to the wedding. Franck is less than pleased that he isn't on the list, but he is determined to make an appearance too in a bid to woo the family - meanwhile, Kathy is on notice from the coven to do away with her Abdulla problem and seeks out old friend and yoga-loving Hindu vampire Rishi. When Abdulla realises what Franck is planning, he makes a mad dash to the wedding to try and intercept him before it's too late - little does he know, though, that Shafi has also turned up to sabotage what he thinks are Abdulla's nuptials at an Indian wedding that lasts long in the memory.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and his temporary DS Jamie Winter must unravel a sinister web of lies from both past and present in order to catch a killer in the ghost village of Little Auburn, a place that has been left derelict and untouched since the Second World War. As three groups fight over the village's future, its fate rests with local landowner Roderick Craven - when one of those involved in the dispute is run over by a tank while cycling home and more deaths subsequently occur, can Barnaby find the link between them and stop the killings?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter discover just how far some people will go for power when they investigate the death of a member of the Bleakridge Watch - a local neighbourhood watch group - in the most remote village in Midsomer. The victim is local butcher Angus Colton, who was found lying frozen in his meat freezer - the police are told that that pub landlord Mitch McAllister hated Angus, but Mitch and his partner Lena claim that the Watch are a total nuisance. Later in a dark field, an old barn is set alight...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Tensions run high in Lower Pampling as a new type of cricket threatens a century of tradition - star batsman Leo Henderson wins a match for his team and takes them through to the C10 Slam tournament semi-final, but he is then found dead in the practice area pummelled by cricket balls later that day. DCI Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate the death of the star cricketer during a tournament which draws them into a dangerous game - Barnaby learns that C10 is not everyone's cup of tea and council members who hate its vulgarity plan a village vote to decide whether it stays, but could the dislike of a cricket format really be a motive for murder?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Under cover of darkness, local estate agent Seb Huntington releases animals from their cages at the Belville Small Pet Show - someone confronts Seb and the following morning Ailsa Benson arrives to set up her pet food stall to find Seb dead surrounded by escaped bunnies... Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Dr Oliver Marcet and learn that the victim died from a stab wound to the neck - hearing Ailsa Benson's alibi, Barnaby and Winter next interview Seb's distraught girlfriend Tegan Langton and her boss Delphi Hartley. Finding no reason anyone would want to harm Seb or sabotage the show, they leave Tegan to be comforted by best friend Shray Varma watched from afar by the mysterious Errol Judd. When Winter gleans from Seb's computer that he was sabotaging the show, Barnaby posits that someone murdered Seb to stop him - was this a case of a rivalry taken too far, or is the killer driven by something darker?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A missing girl and a murdered student set Vera on an investigation that triggers memories from her own childhood.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse is called in to investigate when a wealthy American tourist who apparently fell victim to a heart attack is found dead in her hotel - the Oxford detective discovers that her death is linked to the disappearance of a priceless Anglo-Saxon antiquity called the Wolvercote Tongue from the Ashmolean Museum.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Rosemary's maternal side is brought out when she and Laura find an abandoned baby under a gooseberry bush in Penelope Braxton's garden - Penelope is remarrying her ex-husband Tim and our heroines are working on a memorial garden as an intended wedding present from Penelope to Tim. Rosemary and Laura are forced to care for the baby as they try to find out who the mother is and why she would abandon him, but events take a dramatic turn when neighbouring artist Sir Carlos Potter is found murdered - how is he connected, will the girls be able to reunite mother and baby, and will Rosemary remain enchanted by the prospect of bringing up a child?

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of sleuthing gardeners. Laura's son Matthew and his friends are on an annual tennis holiday at a beautiful tennis camp in southern Spain that is owned by former champion Ray Parfitt - meanwhile, Laura and Rosemary are creating a trophy garden for a pro-am tennis tournament that Ray is holding. When one of the players is found dead after a night out, everyone assumes that it was a drunken accident but the girls suspect foul play - as Rosemary rediscovers the thrill of riding motor scooters in the neighbouring village of Mija while Laura finds the local bullring to be a mysterious and threatening place, the value of property proves to be the driving force for evil in this idyllic sun-drenched resort.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. Rosemary's cousin Charles is performing with an amateur dramatic group and Rosemary and Laura have been brought along to prepare the garden of the Open Air Theatre in time for opening night - everyone is deeply shocked when one of the actors accidentally shoots himself during rehearsal, but the police then discover the gun was loaded with live ammunition and not blanks. It becomes apparent that there is a murderer in their midst - was the bullet intended for Adam, or the theatre's philanthropist Victor Channing? As Victor's wife Jenny gets stage fright, her role in the play is given to Laura to Rosemary's displeasure - with opening night fast approaching, Rosemary struggles to complete the garden on her own as Laura, who is delighted with her part, becomes more involved with the production. Will the play go without a hitch, or is someone out to sabotage it?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Miss Marple investigates when her holiday at an old school friend's coastal villa is interrupted by the mysterious death of one of her fellow guests just hours after he told the ghostly tale of a murderous child.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Careful not to be seen, Samantha Berry slips away from Whitcombe Grange - while dressed in Georgian period attire - on her way to a secret rendezvous. Unaware that a drone is filming her, she is then stabbed to death by an unseen assailant... With Kam away on a course, Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Petra Antonescu and she informs them that the victim was stabbed with a feather quill pen - however, Barnaby is puzzled to find a syringe lying nearby. Tracing Samantha to the Grange, Barnaby and Winter meet owners James and Kitty Oswood - who explain that they host Jane Austen experience weekends - and Winter learns from the Oswoods' rebellious daughter Polly that Samantha kept asking questions about the house and village. When Samantha is found to be a journalist with a special interest in the local village's new delivery service for prescriptions by drone, Barnaby and Winter need to look back in time if they are to find her killer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The annual Thassingham Classical Music Festival draws in big audiences as several musicians anxiously compete for the coveted Falconer Bursary Award - shockwaves rocket though it when Jacob Wheeler is awarded the prize instead of the supremely talented Zac Sowande, but shock soon turns to horror when Jacob is found murdered strangled by violin string. Barnaby's initial investigations begin by focusing on Jacob's fellow musicians and their charismatic maestro Michael Falconer, who is using the festival to debut his Ninth Symphony while simultaneously belittling his own musician son Dan - when Barnaby realises that Jacob's Stradivarius is missing and that Jacob might not have been the completely dedicated musician his sister Natalie claims him to be, his subsequent investigations lead them deep into a world that is haunted by a potentially deadly curse.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Causton is buzzing at the opening of a new brewery on the site of a famously cursed Abbey. However, excitement turns to fear when a man is found boiled to death in one of the vats. DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are puzzled; could this really be about beer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Mahesh Sidana - a butterfly collector and founding member of an elite IQ society - is found murdered after being pinned to a wall in a manner similar to his treasured butterfly specimens, DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are thrust into a crime that impacts not only on their community, but internationally. Can they catch the culprit - with the help of an old friend - before another victim is found?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the novels by Ann Cleeves. After two young people are killed in the same way - drowned and surrounded by flowers - DCI Vera Stanhope knows that she must catch the murderer before they strike again. Aided by her team, especially her trusted right-hand man Sergeant Joe Ashworth, she unpicks the complex and dysfunctional relationships amongst a group of bird-watching friends. As the friends' loyalty turns to betrayal, Vera finds that a small act of teenage blackmail and an illicit affair may have driven someone to kill.

programme.title: Protection

programme.title: Protection

programme.title: Inspector Morse

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. An old Army friend of Blaketon causes havoc in the village, and Greengrass is in trouble when he innocently buys some stolen sheep.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. Loyalties are tested when Blaketon finds himself at the wrong end of the law, and Greengrass tries to turn some dismantled motorcycles into hard cash.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI John Barnaby takes on another case as the head of Causton CID. A social services investigator calls on elderly eccentrics William Bingham and his wife Mary but is sent away rudely by their daughter Selina and her husband Eddie Stanton - the Binghams live as recluses in upper-class squalor while the nearby Stantons run a stud farm with Ben Viviani, who is in love with Eddie's daughter Verity. Ben's mother Maggie had also humiliated the investigator - when his body is found in a river, they therefore all come under suspicion. Barnaby meets the Binghams and learns that they never recovered from losing their elder daughter and son in a drowning accident - passions are then aroused as Selina forces Ben to take her to bed before slashing Maggie's paintings with a knife. Mary later invites Barnaby to tea, but he discovers before he arrives that her daughter's body was never found - and then Mary is found dead. Could a mysterious reference to a moon crater called Bingham hold a clue?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo tells Andy she was never pregnant and the farmer chases his terrified wife to the barn, where he badly injures himself in a fall. Gennie suspects Brenda has feelings for Bob.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiz storms across the road to confront John but is forced to apologise when the truth comes out. Tyrone decides to visit his mum and Tina is upset about David's date with Amber.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tyrone takes Molly to visit his mum Jackie Dobbs (Margi Clarke), but is unnerved by a mystery man waiting outside. Meanwhile, Fiz and John reflect on their kiss the night before.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. A stolen war medal tests the friendship between a young boy and a flying ace, Greengrass fences stolen golf balls, and Maggie and Neil try to reconcile their differences.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. Suspicions are aroused in the village when a young girl claims that she is being stalked, a new sergeant's arrival heralds an unwelcome change for both Ventress and Greengrass, and could romance be in the air for Maggie?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby decides to join a trip from Midsomer Parva to Brighton because he is suspicious about a deal to buy coastal land for holiday chalets by Causton's mayor Dave Hicks - he discovers that the land wanted by Hicks is prone to flooding from the sea. Also against the proposal is Lady Matilda William, a descendant of a French knight Sir Richard Guillaume, whose son Richard will be the last of the line because of brain damage sustained in an attack 20 years ago - in Brighton, some of the villagers go to the funfair. When Dalgleish takes a ride on the ghost train, he emerges from the tunnel beheaded - Barnaby learns about a proposal to build flood defences which would make Hicks' land rocket in value and that Dalgleish lent Hicks money to bribe councillors to agree. Back in Midsomer, Barnaby realises there could be a connection between Dalgleish's greedy desire for land and Lady Matilda's desire to preserve the Guillaume family line... but who is prepared to kill to protect Richard?

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis again comes out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway and his assistant DS Lizzie Maddox as the team's abilities are sorely tested by the brutal murder of American classics student Rose Anderson, whose body is hauled from a canal with stab wounds to the neck and abdomen - initial suspicion falls on the wife of astrophysics professor Felix Garwood, who had recently broken off an affair with Rose and is married to Rose's PhD supervisor. Could the jealous wife have committed murder?

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: The third run of the female-led crime drama series continues. Dorothy is not impressed as Rachel hides out at Janet's, and even Rachel knows deep down that she will have to face her husband soon. The disturbing story of Joe Bevan continues to unfold as the body count rises and the team faces the task of identifying the victims. Joe's daughter Helen faces a tough time as the press interest mounts and she begins to realise the true extent of her father's horrific actions.

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: DCs Janet Scott and Rachel Bailey tackle some of the most extreme crimes imaginable while also dealing with their own personal struggles. Rachel's self-destructive behaviour begins to have an effect on Janet's daughter Taisie. Janet, meanwhile, is mortified when Gill berates her for inappropriate behaviour towards young sergeant Rob. The duo investigate the death of a care home resident whose daughter complains about the level of care he was receiving. Will they find any evidence of foul play?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur and Ray discover that life is not always fair at the fairground when Arthur swaps the novelty contents of his lock-up for a fruit machine full of stolen money.

programme.title: Sharpe

programme.title: Smokey and the Bandit 2
programme.desc: Comedy crime caper sequel. It's been a few years since Cletus and the Bandit made their famous 28-hour run to Texas for a few cases of Coors, and the Bandit is now a washed-up has-been living in the past... that is, until Big Enos and Little Enos make him another offer. The pair want the Bandit to transport a live elephant across the United States to Texas in three days or less, but it's a mammoth task that proves far from easy when old enemy Sheriff Buford T Justice enters hot pursuit of them!

programme.title: The World Is Not Enough
programme.desc: The 19th entry in the James Bond film series. Oil tycoon Sir Robert King is trying to build a pipeline along the southern end of the Caspian Sea, rivalling the large Russian lines to the north - he is murdered by Renard, a Russian terrorist who has a bullet lodged in his brain stem that makes him immune to pain. MI6 fears that King's daughter Elektra will become Renard's next target, and so Bond is assigned to protect her, but he quickly becomes suspicious about Elektra, especially when M goes missing... Meanwhile, Bond gains aid from research scientist Christmas Jones and Russian gangster Zukovsky in tracking down Renard, who is planning a nuclear disaster that threatens all of humanity.

Mike and Frank find little of value on a farm but hope to buy something worthwhile from a demolition expert and an oil can collector.

programme.title: No Room For Error
programme.desc: The island is drenched in sun and there's a crackle of anticipation as the cream of the road racing crop eagerly await a TT like none before - there are newcomer nerves alongside shock and awe as Michael Dunlop leaves jaws on the floor with a stunning opening lap to set the tone for a record-breaking fortnight at the 2023 event.

programme.title: Die Another Day
programme.desc: The 20th entry in the James Bond film series and Pierce Brosnan's final appearance as the secret agent. 007 is assigned to North Korea on a mission to assassinate a colonel when he is betrayed by a double agent at MI6 and captured - after enduring 14 months of torture, James is traded at the Korean border for Zao, a North Korean agent and associate of the colonel, in a prisoner exchange. Bond then escapes his subsequent MI6 detention and tracks Zao to Havana where he meets NSA agent Jinx and learns that she is working on the same case - James soon discovers that Zao is in league with the British diamond and technology tycoon Sir Gustav Graves... and that the two are planning to use a new satellite called Icarus to change the power balance of the world permanently.
