However, before he can savor his favorite beverage, the highly eccentric and wealthy Darwin Mayflower and his equally odd wife, Minerva, rope Hawk into an ambitious series of heists. Soon Hawk is stealing no less than major works by Leonardo da Vinci, priceless pieces that the Mayflowers plan to use in an exceedingly nefarious way.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: Nick Gardenia (Chevy Chase) is a writer who has moved to a cabin in the California mountains to work on a novel. He is kidnapped by a pair of criminals and forced into robbing a bank. On the run from the law, Nick seeks assistance from his ex-wife, Glenda (Goldie Hawn), a big-hearted lawyer. Knowing he would never commit a crime, she lets him stay at her house despite the fact that her husband, Ira (Charles Grodin), a district attorney, is throwing a party for law enforcement officials.

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger
programme.desc: The Rev. Shay moves out West to set up his new home in Montana so that he can spread God's word. But when his wife, Raysha, leaves him for another man -- in part because she wants to return to Philadelphia -- the reverend decides to replace his spiritual ways with a gun. After shooting down his wife and her lover, he battles a landowner intent on keeping all the town's water for himself. But his deadly ways make him yearn for a belief in God again.

programme.title: Unthinkable
programme.desc: FBI Agent Helen Brody (Carrie-Anne Moss) races to discover the location of three nuclear bombs, each programmed to detonate in a different city. When authorities arrest terrorist suspect Younger (Michael Sheen), who announced the murderous plot in a video, special operative Harold Humphries (Samuel L. Jackson) joins Brody in the interrogation. He takes escalating measures to extract answers from Younger, but Younger clams up. Brody begins to question their brutal methods as time ticks away.

programme.title: Half Past Dead
programme.desc: Criminal mastermind Donny/49er One (Morris Chestnut) has set in motion a plan to infiltrate a high-tech prison in order to persuade a death row inmate to reveal the whereabouts of $200 million worth of gold. Undercover FBI agent Sascha (Steven Seagal) must stop him before it's too late.

programme.title: The Experiment
programme.desc: Unemployed Travis (Adrien Brody) enrolls in a psychological role-playing experiment, where participants assume the identities of inmates and prison guards in an empty jail, with the promise of a $1,000-a-day reward. Another participant, Barris (Forest Whitaker), embraces his correctional officer role with a vengeance, and before long, the prisoners find themselves at the mercy of their keepers. All the test subjects discover how easily violence and cruelty can manifest itself in human behavior.

programme.title: Redbelt
programme.desc: Martial artist Mike Terry (Chiwetel Ejiofor) lives by a strict code of no competitions, for he feels that such contests weaken fighters. After saving a famous action star (Tim Allen) from a brutal attack, Mike takes a job in the film industry. He soon finds his personal beliefs and integrity on the line as circumstances force him to participate in a prize fight.

programme.title: Maximum Risk
programme.desc: French police officer Alain Moreau makes an astonishing discovery: Mikhail, a man who died recently in a breakneck car chase, is the twin brother he never knew. Alain then uncovers a web of family secrets that lead him to New York City, where his brother was involved with the Russian Mafia. Teaming up with Mikhail's lover, Alex Minetti, Alain must now assume his twin's identity and go undercover to avenge Mikhail's death.

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A former criminal (Wesley Snipes) goes on the run with a stripper (Jacquelyn Quinones) after a drug deal goes bad.

programme.title: Elektra Luxx
programme.desc: A favor for a woman from her past throws the life of a pregnant, retired porn star (Carla Gugino) into chaos.

programme.title: Spring Break
programme.desc: College guys (David Knell, Steve Bassett, Perry Lang) team up for beer, silly contests and friendship with girls in Fort Lauderdale, Fla.

programme.title: Akayla
programme.desc: Vijay's peaceful life is disrupted when a gangster threatens his family, forcing him to confront danger head-on.

programme.title: Gair
programme.desc: A child adopted by a wealthy man grows up to be rich and successful and attracts a lot of hatred and envy.

programme.title: Dil Hai Ke Manta Nahin
programme.desc: A rich, spoiled girl, Pooja, flees to Mumbai for love with a movie star. On a bus, she meets Raghu, who schemes for wealth, but love blooms.

programme.title: Sadak
programme.desc: A taxi driver fights to save a woman from a ruthless brothel, battling evil, corruption, and his own demons as love drives him to risk everything.

programme.title: Izzat Ki Roti
programme.desc: Veerendra Pratap creates a rift between Laxmi's sons to take her business.

programme.title: Veergati
programme.desc: Thrown out of his job at a hospital, Ajay begins to gamble and soon has angry gangsters on his tail with nowhere to go.

programme.title: Khanjar
programme.desc: Ajay has a past and does not know that he will be swept into a web of lies, deceit where a killer is killing people.

programme.title: Thamma
programme.desc: Two lovers battle magic, family ties, and nature to defend their romance in a mystical world where ancient powers and prophecies threaten to keep them apart.

programme.title: Laalo-Krishna Sada Sahaayate
programme.desc: Laalo, a rickshaw driver, is trapped in a farmhouse and must confront regret and dreams. Visions of Krishna guide him toward redemption, resilience, and meaning.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: In a country where the government has imposed a national curfew, single mother Susan notices changes in her daughter's behavior.She seeks virtual help from a pastor, who proposes conducting an online.

programme.title: Secret Superstar
programme.desc: Insia loves singing but comes from a strict family. Her father blocks her, while her mother supports. She posts songs, gains fame, and pursues her dream.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An American serving in the French Foreign Legion on an archaeological dig at the ancient city of Hamunaptra accidentally awakens an undead priest.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: An undefeated army led by a scorpion king is erased from history. A high priest wants to resurrect them but needs a special bracelet to do so.

programme.title: Eleven
programme.desc: A brave and able officer with a solid record of solving tough cases is allotted to a new, more challenging serial killing inquiry.

programme.title: Oh My Kadavule
programme.desc: Friends Siri and Chandu find it challenging to define their relation to their respective partners. The equation between them is actually friendship or?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali suspects that Taarak is hiding something in his laptop when he behaves in a secretive manner. S01 E1179.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya enters just as Anjali mulls over her next move. She's shocked by Anjali's disclosure. S01 E1180.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Taarak reveals the truth about Kavita, they all go to the police station. S01 E1184.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.desc: A retired bullfighter credited with saving a young man from a bull arranges the death of the boy's father to protect his own reputation.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A magician claims an airtight alibi -- being sealed in a tank of water -- in the murder of a blackmailing associate.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo's prime suspect in the case of a drowned yacht magnate also turns up dead.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An egotistic TV detective matches wits with Columbo after murdering his producer, a former lover and current blackmailer.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The curator (Joyce Van Patten) of a strapped family-owned museum stages a robbery, for insurance, then murders to hide her crime; guests Celeste Holm, Tim O'Connor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An accountant, embezzling to support his wife's lifestyle, murders his partner after the man discovers his crimes.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A mystery writer uses her plot as a guide to murder her nephew, whom she blames for her niece's death.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a gourmet restaurant owner who had been the victim of an extortionist.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A TV-network executive murders her boss and lover when he fails to promote her.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo suspects a psychologist (Nicol Williamson), a noted expert in mind control, is guilty of murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An Irish poet, who fronts a peace organization while secretly running guns, kills an arms dealer who tries to swindle him.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood director tries to fool Columbo when a studio becomes a murder scene.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: The Mad Doctor of Market Street
programme.desc: A fugitive doctor (Lionel Atwill) tries to raise the dead for South Sea Islanders.

programme.title: The Mad Ghoul
programme.desc: A mad scientist (George Zucco) turns his assistant (David Bruce) into a zombie as part of a plan to steal his assistant's lover (Evelyn Ankers).

programme.title: Man-Made Monster
programme.desc: A mad scientist (Lionel Atwill) makes an electric man (Lon Chaney Jr.) who glows and must wear a rubber suit.

programme.title: The Monster and the Girl
programme.desc: A mad scientist creates a monster when he transplants the brain of an executed murderer into the body of an ape.

programme.title: Monster on the Campus
programme.desc: A professor turns into a Neanderthal killer after injecting himself with the blood of an ancient fish.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: An Egyptian mummy (Boris Karloff) searches Cairo for the girl (Zita Johann) he thinks is his long-lost princess.","large":"A team of British archaeologists led by Sir Joseph Whemple discover the mummified remains of the ancient Egyptian prince Imhotep, along with the legendary scroll of Thoth. When one of the archaeologists recites the scroll aloud, Imhotep returns to life, but escapes. Several years later, Imhotep has taken on the guise of a wealthy man, as he searches Egypt for his lost love, who he believes has been reincarnated as the lovely Helen Grosvenor.

programme.title: The Mummy's Curse
programme.desc: A mummy (Lon Chaney Jr.) and his princess (Virginia Christine) roam the Louisiana bayou.

programme.title: The Mummy's Ghost
programme.desc: A 3000-year-old limping mummy (Lon Chaney) seeks his reincarnated princess (Ramsay Ames) in a Midwestern college town.

programme.title: The Mummy's Hand
programme.desc: Archaeologists defile the tomb of mummified Kharis, who was buried alive for falling in love with an Egyptian princess.","large":"In Cairo, archaeologist Steve Banning (Dick Foran) unearths a vase that he believes could lead him to the ancient tomb of Princess Ananka. Unknown to Steve, his colleague, Professor Andoheb (George Zucco), is also the High Priest of Karnak who holds the secrets of Karas, a mummy who guards Ananka's tomb. Upon receiving funds from magician Solvani (Cecil Kellaway) and his daughter, Marta (Peggy Moran), Steve and the Solvanis embark on an expedition to the grave site, where Karas awaits.

programme.title: The Mummy's Tomb
programme.desc: Old archaeologist (Dick Foran) recalls mummy (Lon Chaney) at large in New England.

programme.title: Night Creatures
programme.desc: Pirate Captain Clegg (Peter Cushing), an English vicar by day, leads ghostly mounted smugglers by night.

programme.title: Night Monster
programme.desc: A man (Lionel Atwill) uses mind over matter to replace his legs, then hunts the doctors who took them.

programme.title: The Night Walker
programme.desc: A lawyer (Robert Taylor) advises a blind man's rich widow (Barbara Stanwyck) tormented by nightmares.

programme.title: The People Under the Stairs
programme.desc: Hoping to find a fortune in gold, a boy instead discovers the horrific secrets lurking inside the home of two murderous siblings.","large":"When young Fool (Brandon Adams) breaks into the home of his family's greedy and uncaring landlords, he discovers a disturbing scenario where incestuous adult siblings have mutilated a number of boys and kept them imprisoned under stairs in their large, creepy house. As Fool attempts to flee before the psychopaths can catch him, he meets their daughter, Alice (A.J. Langer), who has been spared any extreme discipline by her deranged parents. Can Fool and Alice escape before it's too late?

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Claude Rains) rises from the Paris sewers to boost his favorite opera understudy's (Susanna Foster) career.","large":"Talented Christine (Susanna Foster) is unaware that her singing lessons are being funded by a secret admirer, Enrique (Claude Rains), a mysterious violinist with a disfigured face. Christine's colleagues become suspicious when mysterious accidents start occurring at the Paris Opera House, as the deaths coincide with her meteoric rise to stardom. Christine's suitors, Raoul (Edgar Barrier) and Anatole (Nelson Eddy), brave the dark recesses of the opera house to find the true culprit.

programme.title: Phantom of the Opera
programme.desc: An acid-scarred composer (Herbert Lom) has his dwarf helper bring an opera singer (Heather Sears) to his London sewer hide-out.","large":"Composer Lord Ambrose D'Arcy (Michael Gough) and his backer, Harry Hunter (Edward De Souza), struggle to find a replacement for the female lead in their new opera after she quits in the wake of a gruesome murder. When a new prospect, the nubile Christine Charles (Heather Sears), disappears, Harry cautiously investigates. Meanwhile, a mysterious masked man (Herbert Lom) who is eerily familiar with the opera holds Christine captive and offers to groom her to play the part.

programme.title: Revenge of the Creature
programme.desc: Florida aquarium workers (John Agar, Lori Nelson, John Bromfield) communicate by cattle prod with a captured gill-man.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: Tarantula
programme.desc: Desert scientists (John Agar, Mara Corday, Leo G. Carroll) try to stop a fortified spider the size of a building.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: An alien that can duplicate other life forms invades a polar research station in this remake of the 1951 classic "The Thing from Another World."","large":"In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp, and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot and the camp doctor lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Four big worms with multiple tongues dig high-speed around people (Kevin Bacon, Fred Ward, Finn Carter) in the middle of nowhere.","large":"Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: The Mexican government hires two handymen (Fred Ward, Michael Gross) to battle huge man-eating worms plaguing an oil field.","large":"After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: An Asian werewolf (Warner Oland) bites a botanist (Henry Hull) in Tibet and rivals him for the antidote in London.","large":"While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami, who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: The Wolf Man
programme.desc: Bitten by a werewolf, an aristocrat (Lon Chaney) grows fangs, fur and a muzzle, then begs his father (Claude Rains) for help.","large":"When his brother dies, Larry Talbot (Lon Chaney) returns to Wales and reconciles with his father (Claude Rains). While there, he visits an antique shop and, hoping to impress Gwen (Evelyn Ankers), the attractive shopkeeper, buys a silver walking cane. That same night he kills a wolf with it, only to later learn that he actually killed a man (Bela Lugosi). A gypsy (Maria Ouspenskaya) explains that it was her son, a werewolf, that he killed, and that Larry is now one himself.

programme.title: Altered
programme.desc: Fifteen years after they were abducted by aliens, four men get a chance to take revenge when they capture one of the creatures.","large":"Forever damaged by their stint as the scientific subjects of hostile alien creatures, a trio of alien-abduction survivors -- Otis (Michael C. Williams), Duke (Brad William Henke) and Cody (Paul McCarthy-Boyington) -- troll the wooded site of their disappearance, heavily armed, in search of their attackers. After wounding a violent alien in the woods, the three drag its dying body to the home of reclusive fellow abductee Wyatt (Adam Kaufman), barricade themselves in and prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When plans for a weekend vacation hit a dead end, friends find themselves stranded in unfamiliar territory, pursued by a bloodthirsty predator. Holed up in an isolated cabin, the friends must fight to survive as the body count rises.

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: Meet the Fockers
programme.desc: A man (Ben Stiller) fears the worst when he accompanies his fiancée's uptight father (Robert De Niro) and mother to meet his free-spirited mom and dad (Dustin Hoffman).","large":"Now that Greg Focker is "in" with his soon-to-be in-laws, Jack and Dina Byrnes, it looks like smooth sailing for him and his fiancée, Pam. But that's before Pam's parents meet Greg's parents, the Fockers. The hyper-relaxed Fockers and the tightly-wound Byrnes are woefully mismatched from the start, and no matter how hard Greg and Pam try, there is just no bringing their families together. This all adds up to a disastrously funny time of getting to know you.

programme.title: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: When a woman brings her boyfriend home for her sister's wedding, her father, a former CIA agent, takes an instant dislike to him.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: As two clans descend on the scene of young twins' birthday, Greg Focker's moonlighting at a pharmaceutical company threatens to derail his position of trust with Jack, his uptight father-in-law.","large":"After 10 years of marriage and two children, it seems that Greg Focker has finally earned a place in the "circle of trust" of his uptight father-in-law, Jack. However, Greg is moonlighting with a drug company, which raises Jack's suspicions. As two clans descend on the scene of the young twins' birthday party, Greg must find a way through myriad misunderstandings to prove to Jack -- once and for all -- that he is worthy of being the next family patriarch.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: Based on the story of Ron Kovic, a Marine who returned from Vietnam a paraplegic and later became an anti-war activist.","large":"In the mid 1960s, suburban New York teenager Ron Kovic (Tom Cruise) enlists in the Marines, fulfilling what he sees as his patriotic duty. During his second tour in Vietnam, he accidentally kills a fellow soldier during a retreat and later becomes permanently paralyzed in battle. Returning home to an uncaring Veterans Administration bureaucracy and to people on both sides of the political divide who don't understand what he went through, Kovic becomes an impassioned critic of the war.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert try to return to Earth after an explosion aborts the April 1970 moonshot.","large":"This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both the astronauts' survival and their safe return to Earth.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Newly appointed British Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight against incredible odds. During the coming weeks, Churchill's courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.","large":"The fate of Western Europe hangs on Winston Churchill in the early days of World War II. The newly appointed British prime minister must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight on against incredible odds. During the next four weeks in 1940, Churchill cements his legacy as his courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.

programme.title: First Man
programme.desc: Engineer Neil Armstrong spends years in training after joining NASA in the 1960s. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on a historic mission to the moon.","large":"Hoping to reach the moon by the end of the decade, NASA plans a series of extremely dangerous, unprecedented missions in the early 1960s. Engineer Neil Armstrong joins the space program, spending years in training and risking his life during test flights. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on the historic Apollo 11 spaceflight.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: Based on the story of Ron Kovic, a Marine who returned from Vietnam a paraplegic and later became an anti-war activist.","large":"In the mid 1960s, suburban New York teenager Ron Kovic (Tom Cruise) enlists in the Marines, fulfilling what he sees as his patriotic duty. During his second tour in Vietnam, he accidentally kills a fellow soldier during a retreat and later becomes permanently paralyzed in battle. Returning home to an uncaring Veterans Administration bureaucracy and to people on both sides of the political divide who don't understand what he went through, Kovic becomes an impassioned critic of the war.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Astronauts Jim Lovell, Fred Haise and Jack Swigert try to return to Earth after an explosion aborts the April 1970 moonshot.","large":"This Hollywood drama is based on the events of the Apollo 13 lunar mission, astronauts Jim Lovell (Tom Hanks), Fred Haise (Bill Paxton) and Jack Swigert (Kevin Bacon) find everything going according to plan after leaving Earth's orbit. However, when an oxygen tank explodes, the scheduled moon landing is called off. Subsequent tensions within the crew and numerous technical problems threaten both the astronauts' survival and their safe return to Earth.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Newly appointed British Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight against incredible odds. During the coming weeks, Churchill's courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.","large":"The fate of Western Europe hangs on Winston Churchill in the early days of World War II. The newly appointed British prime minister must decide whether to negotiate with Hitler or fight on against incredible odds. During the next four weeks in 1940, Churchill cements his legacy as his courageous decisions and leadership help change the course of world history.

programme.title: First Man
programme.desc: Engineer Neil Armstrong spends years in training after joining NASA in the 1960s. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on a historic mission to the moon.","large":"Hoping to reach the moon by the end of the decade, NASA plans a series of extremely dangerous, unprecedented missions in the early 1960s. Engineer Neil Armstrong joins the space program, spending years in training and risking his life during test flights. On July 16, 1969, the nation and world watch in wonder as Armstrong and fellow astronauts Buzz Aldrin and Michael Collins embark on the historic Apollo 11 spaceflight.

programme.title: Born on the Fourth of July
programme.desc: Based on the story of Ron Kovic, a Marine who returned from Vietnam a paraplegic and later became an anti-war activist.","large":"In the mid 1960s, suburban New York teenager Ron Kovic (Tom Cruise) enlists in the Marines, fulfilling what he sees as his patriotic duty. During his second tour in Vietnam, he accidentally kills a fellow soldier during a retreat and later becomes permanently paralyzed in battle. Returning home to an uncaring Veterans Administration bureaucracy and to people on both sides of the political divide who don't understand what he went through, Kovic becomes an impassioned critic of the war.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his future brother-in-law, a fast-talking trainee, tangle with Atlanta's most-dangerous criminal.","large":"For two years, security guard Ben has tried to convince James, a veteran cop, that he is worthy of James' sister, Angela. When Ben is finally accepted into the police academy, James decides to test his mettle by inviting him along on a shift deliberately designed to scare the trainee. However, events take an unexpected turn when their wild night leads to Atlanta's most-notorious criminal and Ben's rapid-fire mouth proves as dangerous as the bullets whizzing by them.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: As his wedding day approaches, Ben heads to Miami with his soon-to-be brother-in-law James to bring down a drug dealer who's supplying the dealers of Atlanta with product.","large":"Rookie lawman Ben Barber (Kevin Hart) aspires to become a detective like James Payton (Ice Cube), his future brother-in-law. James reluctantly takes Ben to Miami to follow up on a lead that's connected to a drug ring. The case brings them to a homicide detective and a computer hacker who reveals evidence that implicates a respected businessman. It's now up to James and Ben to prove that charismatic executive Antonio Pope is actually a violent crime lord who rules southern Florida's drug trade.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A young couple suffering from arrested development are forced to live next to a fraternity house after the birth of their newborn baby.

programme.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: A man (Seth Rogen), his pregnant wife (Rose Byrne) and their former neighbor (Zac Efron) clash with wild and rebellious sorority sisters.","large":"Life is good for Mac Radner (Seth Rogen) and pregnant wife Kelly (Rose Byrne) until the unruly sisters of Kappa Nu move in next door. As the loud parties threaten the sale of their home, the couple turn to ex-neighbor and one-time enemy Teddy Sanders (Zac Efron) for help. Now united with the former college student, the trio devises schemes to get the wild sorority off the block. Unfortunately, the rebellious young women refuse to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor she's profiling.","large":"Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: Ride Along
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his future brother-in-law, a fast-talking trainee, tangle with Atlanta's most-dangerous criminal.","large":"For two years, security guard Ben has tried to convince James, a veteran cop, that he is worthy of James' sister, Angela. When Ben is finally accepted into the police academy, James decides to test his mettle by inviting him along on a shift deliberately designed to scare the trainee. However, events take an unexpected turn when their wild night leads to Atlanta's most-notorious criminal and Ben's rapid-fire mouth proves as dangerous as the bullets whizzing by them.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: As his wedding day approaches, Ben heads to Miami with his soon-to-be brother-in-law James to bring down a drug dealer who's supplying the dealers of Atlanta with product.","large":"Rookie lawman Ben Barber (Kevin Hart) aspires to become a detective like James Payton (Ice Cube), his future brother-in-law. James reluctantly takes Ben to Miami to follow up on a lead that's connected to a drug ring. The case brings them to a homicide detective and a computer hacker who reveals evidence that implicates a respected businessman. It's now up to James and Ben to prove that charismatic executive Antonio Pope is actually a violent crime lord who rules southern Florida's drug trade.

programme.title: Neighbors
programme.desc: A young couple suffering from arrested development are forced to live next to a fraternity house after the birth of their newborn baby.

programme.title: Neighbors 2: Sorority Rising
programme.desc: A man (Seth Rogen), his pregnant wife (Rose Byrne) and their former neighbor (Zac Efron) clash with wild and rebellious sorority sisters.","large":"Life is good for Mac Radner (Seth Rogen) and pregnant wife Kelly (Rose Byrne) until the unruly sisters of Kappa Nu move in next door. As the loud parties threaten the sale of their home, the couple turn to ex-neighbor and one-time enemy Teddy Sanders (Zac Efron) for help. Now united with the former college student, the trio devises schemes to get the wild sorority off the block. Unfortunately, the rebellious young women refuse to go down without a fight.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor she's profiling.","large":"Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: Evan Almighty
programme.desc: A newly elected congressman (Steve Carell) faces a crisis of biblical proportions when God (Morgan Freeman) commands him to build an ark.","large":"Newscaster Evan Baxter (Steve Carell) leaves Buffalo behind when he wins a seat in Congress. Moving his wife (Lauren Graham) and family to northern Virginia, he seems to have it made, then God (Morgan Freeman) throws a crisis of biblical proportions at his feet: The Lord wants him to build an ark and line up all the animals two-by-two in preparation for a flood.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

programme.title: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: A pistol-packing woman (Charlize Theron) helps a cowardly farmer (Seth MacFarlane) find his inner courage, but when her outlaw husband (Liam Neeson) rides into town seeking revenge, the farmer must put his newfound bravery to the test.","large":"Mild-mannered sheep farmer Albert Stark (Seth MacFarlane) feels certain that the Western frontier is trying to kill him, then he loses his girlfriend, Louise (Amanda Seyfried), to the town's most successful businessman. However, a beautiful, pistol-packing woman named Anna (Charlize Theron) rides into town and helps Albert find his inner courage. Then Stark must put his newfound bravery to the test when Anna's outlaw husband arrives with plans to plant him in an unmarked grave.

programme.title: Hot Fuzz
programme.desc: A British constable (Simon Pegg) feels certain foul play is afoot when a series of grisly accidents rocks his quiet village.","large":"As a former London constable, Nicholas Angel (Simon Pegg) finds it difficult to adapt to his new assignment in the sleepy British village of Sandford. Not only does he miss the excitement of the big city, but he also has a well-meaning oaf (Nick Frost) for a partner. However, when a series of grisly accidents rocks Sandford, Nick smells something rotten in the idyllic village.

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: After her release from prison, a former CEO (Melissa McCarthy) battles old enemies while trying to build a brownie empire with her ex-assistant (Kristen Bell).","large":"Wealthy CEO Michelle Darnell (Melissa McCarthy) always gets her way, until she's busted for insider trading and sent to federal prison. After leaving jail, Darnell finds herself broke, homeless and hated. Luckily, she tracks down former assistant Claire (Kristen Bell), the only person who's willing to help. While staying with Claire and her young daughter, the ex-con devises a new business model for a brownie empire. Unfortunately, some old enemies stand in the way of her return to the top.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman (Amy Poehler) and her hotheaded sister (Tina Fey) throw a party that spirals out of control at their childhood home.","large":"When their parents decide to sell their home, siblings Maura (Amy Poehler) and Kate (Tina Fey) learn that they have one weekend to clean out the junk from their old bedroom. Unhappy with the news, the recently divorced Maura and her hotheaded sister make plans to throw one final bash to recapture their glory days with their former classmates. As the raging party begins to spiral out of control, the gals soon realize that there may not be a house left once the dust settles.

programme.title: This Is 40
programme.desc: Amid a series of personal and professional crises, a long-married couple (Paul Rudd, Leslie Mann) must figure out how to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.","large":"After many years of marriage, Pete (Paul Rudd) is the sole male in a household that includes his wife, Debbie (Leslie Mann), and two young daughters (Iris Apatow, Maude Apatow). As Pete struggles to keep his record label afloat, he and Debbie navigate a three-week course of sex and romance, career victories and financial hardships, aging parents and maturing children. They'll have to learn to forgive, forget and enjoy the rest of their lives -- before they kill each other.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Newly released from prison, Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) reassembles the Blues Brothers Band with new members (John Goodman, Joe Morton).","large":"The now-brotherless Ellwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd) is finally out of prison, attempting to reunite the old band and find a few new partners in crime (John Goodman), (J. Evan Bonifant). In this sequel to the original "Blues Brothers" comedy/musical, Ellwood battles the Chicago police, sings and dances his way out of numerous sticky situations, and manages to get the old band on the road for a hair-raising adventure.

programme.title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
programme.desc: Karan wants justice for Arjun's death. But Deepak, an actor chasing authenticity, tags along, adding chaos to Karan's revenge-driven journey and testing his patience at every turn.

programme.title: Naseeb Apna Apna
programme.desc: She thought she was marrying into a new life. Instead, she walks into a home where the groom's father hides a second, secret marriage - and the truth is far from simple.

programme.title: Nadiya Ke Paar
programme.desc: Chandan loves Gunja, but after her sister's tragic death, tradition demands she marry his brother. Torn between love and duty, Gunja faces a heartbreaking choice that could change everything.

programme.title: Muqadama
programme.desc: Ajit's world shatters when his wife dies after a horrific crime. His quest for revenge leads to bloodshed, but the law catches up, sentencing him to hang for his actions.

programme.title: Ram Lakhan
programme.desc: Two brothers split because of differing beliefs, yet fate brings them back together as they eventually rescue and support each other through unfolding events.

programme.title: Nafrat Ki Aandhi
programme.desc: Ravi convinces Sonu to testify, but their bravery puts them in the crosshairs of danger. Together, they must navigate threats while standing strong for what's right.

programme.title: Maseeha
programme.desc: Krishna and Shiva unite against the ruthless gangster Surajbhan, whose terror touched both their lives. Together, they vow to bring justice and end his reign of fear.

programme.title: Barsaat (1995)
programme.desc: Badal and Tina's love faces major hurdles when her dad disapproves and unjustly locks Badal up for a crime he didn't commit. Can their love survive this tough situation?

programme.title: Andaaz
programme.desc: Andaaz

programme.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Rashmika Mandanna. Pushpa and Bhanwar Singh's fierce rivalry reaches its peak in this explosive finale packed with action, emotion, and long-awaited confrontation.

programme.title: Sooryavanshi
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Katrina Kaif. Mumbai braces for disaster. ATS chief Sooryavanshi races against time to find 600 kg of missing explosives and the ruthless plotters behind it.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: Karthikeya 2
programme.desc: Starring: Nikhil Siddhartha,Anupama Parameswaran. Doctor Karthikeya is framed and hunted. To clear his name, he must dive into ancient mysteries and retrieve a powerful mythological treasure.

programme.title: Autonagar Surya
programme.desc: Starring: Naga Chaitanya Akkineni,Samantha Ruth Prabhu. Surya a juvenile offender completes his education in prison and upon release embarks on his dream project. However he has to overcome numerous obstacles to turn his dream into a reality.

programme.title: Vedha
programme.desc: Starring: Shiva Rajkumar,Ganavi Laxman. Vedha and his daughter Kanaka are on a killing spree. They are being chased by a cop Rama, but they always manage to escape in the nick of time. Can Rama stop the killings?

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Anil Kapoor. A married man decides to have an extramarital affair. Things do not go as planned and life becomes a bundle of confusion.

programme.title: Krrish
programme.desc: Starring: Hrithik Roshan,Priyanka Chopra. A young man with extraordinary powers, Krrish, pursues love in Singapore with Priya. Upon uncovering his father's fate, he must embrace his abilities.

programme.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Kareena Kapoor. Pawan, a Hanuman devotee, finds a speech-impaired Pakistani girl lost in Haryana and undertakes a dangerous journey across borders to reunite her with her family with love.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Game Changer
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Charan,Kiara Advani. Ram Nandan, a bold official, confronts corrupt leaders and fights for electoral fairness, seeking to revolutionize the government's workings and uphold democracy.

programme.title: Acharya
programme.desc: Starring: Chiranjeevi,Ram Charan. When Dharmasthali, a village, is ruled by some of the most powerful but corrupt leaders, a mysterious strangers shows up to end illegal practices and fulfil his comrade's wish.

programme.title: Bulandi
programme.desc: In Bharatpur, Thakurs wield village justice. A rape-and-murder case pits Dada Thakur against his own brother Arjun, risking life for a fair verdict.

programme.title: Pyaasa Sawan
programme.desc: Prabhudas mistakenly thinks that he is son of a wealthy man and wants him to marry his daughter. They marry but go through a lot of troubles.

programme.title: Gautam Govinda
programme.desc: Gautam is a dedicated cop who is transferred to a town that is teeming with criminals and ruled by Dharamdutt. Govinda is assigned to tackle Gautam.

programme.title: Jeevan Mrityu
programme.desc: An honest bank manager is arrested for embezzlement. After his release, he takes revenge on his colleagues who falsely implicated him.

programme.title: Kasam Suhaag Ki
programme.desc: A serpent woman seeks revenge for her husband's murder. Driven by pain and love, she transforms and sets out to punish those responsible for the crime.

programme.title: Adat Se Majboor
programme.desc: In this dramatic tale, devout firefighter Dinanath mistakenly believes Salma is Hindu and plans a future for her with his son. Complications arise with hidden truths and dangerous enemies.

programme.title: Yeh To Kamaal Ho Gaya
programme.desc: Shankar's son is wrongly jailed by the corrupt lawyer Saxena. Shankar kidnaps Saxena's twin and raises him as a thief, setting the stage for a dramatic revenge.

programme.title: Aashiq Hoon Baharon Ka
programme.desc: A romantic saga of a passionate lover unfolds, where devotion collides with destiny, testing the limits of love through sacrifice and dreams.

programme.title: Barood
programme.desc: Anup witnesses his father's murder as a child and travels the world to track down and exact revenge against the killers. However, a New York-based detective tries to get him arrested at any cost.

programme.title: Satyam Shivam Sundaram
programme.desc: Rajeev falls for Roopa, a beautiful singer concealing half her disfigured face. After marriage, he discovers her secret and starts to ignore her, leading to emotional turmoil in their relationship.

programme.title: Saathi
programme.desc: Two brothers, Suraj and Amar, witness their father's murder. They drift apart as Suraj embraces crime while Amar chooses to avoid the criminal path altogether.

programme.title: Roti Kapada Aur Makaan
programme.desc: After his father's death, Bharat struggles to afford food, clothing, and shelter, forcing him to question whether honesty can sustain his life.

programme.title: Main Tera Dushman
programme.desc: Kishan develops an enmity with Thakur Dayalu and a corrupt police officer. After framing him for a murder, Dayalu and his men intend to harm his wife.
